## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory meeting between Guideflow (Jeff) and GrowthX (Marcel Santilli) to explore potential collaboration on SEO and inbound lead generation strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/791fMEMctxu_gy29F55ZKnGDxaxuREZu?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers "growth as a service" with AI-powered content generation that's achieving strong results for clients (75-person team working with companies like Lovable, Augment Code, Base10)](https://fathom.video/share/791fMEMctxu_gy29F55ZKnGDxaxuREZu?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)
  - [Guideflow generates leads primarily through outbound sales and network effects (product watermarks), but has untapped SEO/inbound potential with their new website launch](https://fathom.video/share/791fMEMctxu_gy29F55ZKnGDxaxuREZu?tab=summary&timestamp=20.0)
  - [GrowthX's workflow combines AI tools with human expertise for high-quality, fact-checked content at scale ($30K for 8-week strategy sprint, then $15K/month for execution)](https://fathom.video/share/791fMEMctxu_gy29F55ZKnGDxaxuREZu?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)
  - [Guideflow's current budget constraints (\~$70-100K annually) may not align with GrowthX's pricing structure, but both parties are open to further discussion](https://fathom.video/share/791fMEMctxu_gy29F55ZKnGDxaxuREZu?tab=summary&timestamp=1555.0)

## Topics

### Guideflow's Current Growth Channels

  - [Primary lead sources: product network effects (watermarks showing "powered by Guideflow"), outbound sales motions (email, LinkedIn), and word of mouth](https://fathom.video/share/791fMEMctxu_gy29F55ZKnGDxaxuREZu?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Limited inbound from organic search, but seeing success with their interactive "Demo Tutorial Hub" content](https://fathom.video/share/791fMEMctxu_gy29F55ZKnGDxaxuREZu?tab=summary&timestamp=253.0)
  - [New website launching soon with enhanced showcasing of enterprise clients (Gartner, DocuSign, Cisco)](https://fathom.video/share/791fMEMctxu_gy29F55ZKnGDxaxuREZu?tab=summary&timestamp=265.0)
  - [Creating 5,000+ tutorials programmatically (targeting \~100/week) that explain how to use various software tools, which is driving SEO traffic](https://fathom.video/share/791fMEMctxu_gy29F55ZKnGDxaxuREZu?tab=summary&timestamp=265.0)

### GrowthX's AI-Powered Content Generation System

  - [Focus on sustainable, compounding channels (content/organic) rather than just ads/outbound](https://fathom.video/share/791fMEMctxu_gy29F55ZKnGDxaxuREZu?tab=summary&timestamp=449.0)
  - [Built custom agentic workflow engine with multiple AI services (EXA, Tavli, Perplexity, GPT)](https://fathom.video/share/791fMEMctxu_gy29F55ZKnGDxaxuREZu?tab=summary&timestamp=688.0)
  - [Process includes research planning, content drafting, evaluation loops until quality thresholds are met](https://fathom.video/share/791fMEMctxu_gy29F55ZKnGDxaxuREZu?tab=summary&timestamp=728.0)
  - [Rigorous fact-checking that extracts claims, researches them, and suggests rewrites if inaccurate](https://fathom.video/share/791fMEMctxu_gy29F55ZKnGDxaxuREZu?tab=summary&timestamp=817.0)
  - [Content includes custom visuals, infographics, interactive elements grounded in company documentation](https://fathom.video/share/791fMEMctxu_gy29F55ZKnGDxaxuREZu?tab=summary&timestamp=587.0)
  - [Results: 100+ content pieces for Augment Code in 3 months, generating 400 signups and high rankings](https://fathom.video/share/791fMEMctxu_gy29F55ZKnGDxaxuREZu?tab=summary&timestamp=905.0)

### Client Case Studies and Results

  - [Augment Code: Achieved "all-time high" visibility in guides section with 400+ signups in 3 months](https://fathom.video/share/791fMEMctxu_gy29F55ZKnGDxaxuREZu?tab=summary&timestamp=1001.0)
  - [Webflow: Created 100% of their integration pages with high-quality, grounded content](https://fathom.video/share/791fMEMctxu_gy29F55ZKnGDxaxuREZu?tab=summary&timestamp=951.0)
  - [RAM: Built entire vendor catalog with data-driven pages](https://fathom.video/share/791fMEMctxu_gy29F55ZKnGDxaxuREZu?tab=summary&timestamp=975.0)
  - [Vapi: Created custom interactive agents that boost engagement metrics on content pages](https://fathom.video/share/791fMEMctxu_gy29F55ZKnGDxaxuREZu?tab=summary&timestamp=1001.0)
  - [All clients showing strong rankings in both traditional search and AI answers](https://fathom.video/share/791fMEMctxu_gy29F55ZKnGDxaxuREZu?tab=summary&timestamp=928.0)

### GrowthX's Engagement Model

  - [Initial 8-week strategy sprint ($30K one-time) to shape strategy, set up platform, deliver outputs](https://fathom.video/share/791fMEMctxu_gy29F55ZKnGDxaxuREZu?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [Ongoing growth execution starts at $15K/month after the strategy sprint](https://fathom.video/share/791fMEMctxu_gy29F55ZKnGDxaxuREZu?tab=summary&timestamp=1477.0)
  - [Currently at capacity with 6-week waitlist (only two kickoffs per week)](https://fathom.video/share/791fMEMctxu_gy29F55ZKnGDxaxuREZu?tab=summary&timestamp=1527.0)
  - [Higher price point reflects comprehensive service (strategy, execution, monitoring, optimization)](https://fathom.video/share/791fMEMctxu_gy29F55ZKnGDxaxuREZu?tab=summary&timestamp=1538.0)
  - [Offers free AI-led growth community with resources for companies not ready for full engagement](https://fathom.video/share/791fMEMctxu_gy29F55ZKnGDxaxuREZu?tab=summary&timestamp=1626.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jeff to consider if GrowthX's pricing structure fits Guideflow's current budget (\~$70-100K annually)](https://fathom.video/share/791fMEMctxu_gy29F55ZKnGDxaxuREZu?tab=summary&timestamp=1658.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up meeting to provide more context about Guideflow's growth goals](https://fathom.video/share/791fMEMctxu_gy29F55ZKnGDxaxuREZu?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
  - [Both parties to assess whether full engagement or alternative collaboration makes sense](https://fathom.video/share/791fMEMctxu_gy29F55ZKnGDxaxuREZu?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
  - [Jeff to explore GrowthX's AI-led growth community for free resources in the meantime](https://fathom.video/share/791fMEMctxu_gy29F55ZKnGDxaxuREZu?tab=summary&timestamp=1651.0)
